product_overview: TeamGoals is a multi-tenant SaaS platform that lets real estate teams create branded dashboards, manage rosters, and track individual and team production goals. It provides onboarding, admin roster management, public dashboards and agent performance profiles with built-in password recovery.
core_goals: Create and configure a new team dashboard with custom branding and production goals
Manage team members, assign goals, and publish updates to a live team dashboard
View individual agent performance trends and transaction histories
Expose a public, TV-optimized team dashboard showing high-level progress
Allow administrators to recover access when they forget their password

features.name: Tenant Onboarding
features.description: Guided multi-step setup to create a new team dashboard with branding, admin credentials, and production goals.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start new team onboarding -> Enter company name -> Select dashboard theme -> Configure brand colors and logo -> Setup admin email and password -> Set annual production goals -> Submit onboarding -> See confirmation that the team dashboard was created
Navigate to / -> Start new team onboarding -> Provide local image file for logo -> See instruction that logo must be provided as an external URL and proceed with external URL or placeholder

features.name: Roster Management
features.description: Add, edit, and organize agents and sub-teams, set individual goals and production targets, and publish changes to the live dashboard.
user_flows: Sign in to the admin console -> Open roster management -> Add a new agent by entering agent details -> Set agent goals and target volume -> Save changes -> Publish updates to the live dashboard
Sign in to the admin console -> Open roster management -> Select an existing agent -> Update the agent's goal values -> Save changes -> Confirm updated metrics appear in roster summary

features.name: Agent Performance Profiles
features.description: View individual agent metrics, production trends, and transaction history to monitor performance over time.
user_flows: Open the public team dashboard -> Select an agent from the roster list -> View agent performance summary and key metrics -> View production trend charts over time -> Review the agent's transaction history entries
Open the public team dashboard -> Select an agent -> Observe recent transactions filtered by status (Closed, Pending, Active) -> Export or copy transaction details for review

features.name: Public Team Dashboard
features.description: A viewable dashboard for teams that displays high-level progress metrics and an option for a TV-optimized display.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the public team dashboard -> See high-level team progress metrics and goal completion percentage -> Switch to TV-optimized mode -> Observe a simplified, large-format dashboard suitable for display

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Allow administrators to request a password reset and receive a temporary password via email to regain access.
user_flows: Open the admin password recovery page -> Enter the administrator email address -> Submit the password reset request -> See confirmation that a temporary password email was sent -> Receive temporary password via email and sign in using the temporary password

routes.description: Main admin console for team management

features.name: Tenant Onboarding
features.description: Create a new team dashboard with custom branding and security

features.name: Roster Management
features.description: Manage agents, goals, and transaction data

features.name: Subscription Billing

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Reset forgotten admin passwords via email

known_limitations.impact: Users must host images elsewhere or use generated placeholders
